If there are still some cult Senators who have a shred of decency and loyalty to the Constitution and Oath of Office
They could do one thing to really fuck up Motherfucker.
Switch parties.
Six would do, a baker's dozen would be better.
Same goes for the House.

[Only when he f*cks over their states with some hate-based actions. Like deporting their farm and factory workers.](#post4)usonian 17 min ago #4
[bdamomma](/?com=profile&uid=187392)
(66,430 posts)1. Would
be nice if they did, but I wonder how many GQP's voted for Kamala secretly.
[sakabatou](/?com=profile&uid=152996)
(43,060 posts)2. And possibly give up money from commercial backers?
No way they would.
[onecaliberal](/?com=profile&uid=313523)
(35,824 posts)3. Nope
[usonian](/?com=profile&uid=363910)
(13,821 posts)4. Only when he f*cks over their states with some hate-based actions. Like deporting their farm and factory workers.
Or tariffs, or removing EV subsidies (with one exception).
Won't take long. Hate feels good until you realize it's spitting in the wind.
[Blue Owl](/?com=profile&uid=251054)
(54,749 posts)5. Wouldn't that be nice
